{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Aethertech guns
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Aethertech guns]] are mounted on the walls of the secure room.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aethertech guns]] are weapons used by soldiers.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22">''The Knight'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Aether Technicians with weaponry gifts, masters of pistol Combat Arts, soldiers with unique compatibility for Aethertech guns. She gave us lengthy lists of all their flaws. And many personal insults.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
